albums.title: Hier kommt Conni!

a.curator_notes:
Conni is a unique series that does not use numbered episodes. Instead, each release is a named story (e.g., 'Conni feiert Geburtstag'). Albums typically contain 1-2 complete stories.

Key exclusions:
1. Adventskalender (Christmas countdown audiobooks with 40+ tracks)
2. TV series compilations labeled 'Vier Hörspiele zur TV-Serie' - these are TV episode collections, not the original book-based Hörspiele
3. Conni & Co spinoff series (separate artist - movie tie-ins for older kids)
4. 'Neu' re-releases - newer versions of classic episodes that already exist in the catalog
5. Compilations like 'Conni Pferdegeschichten' and 'Conni und die Gefühle'
6. Special releases: joke book, sing-along album, pandemic special, movie tie-ins

The series spans from 2002 to 2026 with consistent format: individual story releases with episode titles rather than numbers. Main artist 'Conni' (0jRC2uXx4hEpqNrBDJdY7l) is primary, with 'Meine Freundin Conni' (0HerMOOFZXxIF3Yg9BVl0W) containing related but distinct content (TV compilations, special releases).

b.curator_notes: Series spans multiple Spotify artists: 'Conni' (main Hörspiel series), 'Meine Freundin Conni' (TV-based compilations and special content), and 'Meine Freundin Conni - ab 3' (minimal, appears to duplicate content). Excluded 'Conni & Co' artist as it is a separate spin-off series for ages 10+ with numbered chapter books (1-18), distinct from the main Conni picture-book Hörspiele series. The main series uses narrative episode titles without numbering; episodes are identified by their story names. Compilations excluded include: Adventskalender releases (Christmas countdown specials), Pferdegeschichten (horse story compilation), TV-series 4-packs, and joke/song albums. Movie adaptations (Conni & Co films, Geheimnis um Kater Mau) excluded as they are spin-off/special content. Duplicate versions with '(neu)' suffix represent re-recorded 2017-2019 versions and are kept as they are the modern productions; older 2002-2012 versions of the same stories are excluded as duplicates where applicable.
